title: Reproduce the Vibrio nigripulchritudo multi-record circular genome in the web app
summary: Build a circular multi-record canvas for two chromosomes and four plasmids from a single RefSeq GBFF file, using automatic record sizing, explicit row placement, GC content, GC skew, and a left legend.
estimatedTime: 5-15 min after the input is available

downloads.label: GCF_015097735.1
downloads.note: Download the RefSeq genomic GBFF and use it as the GenBank input.

manualSteps.title: Switch to Circular mode
manualSteps.body: Open gbdraw.app and choose Circular before adding the GenBank file.

media.alt: Circular mode selected in the web app header.
media.caption: Select Circular.

manualSteps.title: Upload the GenBank file
manualSteps.body: Upload GCF_015097735.1_ASM1509773v1_genomic.gbff. The app will detect the two chromosomes and four plasmids in the file.

media.alt: Circular input panel with the Vibrio GBFF file selected.
media.caption: GCF_015097735.1_ASM1509773v1_genomic.gbff is selected as the GenBank file.

manualSteps.title: Set the circular layout
manualSteps.body: Use these circular layout settings before enabling the Multi-Record Canvas.

rows: CDS, rRNA, tRNA, tmRNA, ncRNA, repeat_region

operations.title: Basic circular settings
operations.body: Set Output Prefix to Vnig_TUMSAT-TG-2018, Track Preset to Tuckin, and Separate Strands to on.

media.alt: Basic and Layout cards with Vnig_TUMSAT-TG-2018 as the output prefix, Tuckin as the track preset, and Separate Strands selected.
media.caption: Set Output Prefix, Track Preset, and Separate Strands.

operations.title: Palette selector
operations.body: Open the default color palette selector and choose orchid.

media.alt: Colors card with the default color palette menu open and the orchid option highlighted.
media.caption: Open the default color palette selector in the Colors card and choose the highlighted orchid option.

operations.title: Legend position selector
operations.body: Open Legend Position and choose Left.

media.alt: Title and Legend card with the Legend Position menu open and the Left option highlighted.
media.caption: Open Legend Position in the Title & Legend card and choose the highlighted Left option.

operations.title: Selected feature types
operations.body: Keep CDS, rRNA, tRNA, tmRNA, ncRNA, and repeat_region selected.

media.alt: Features card with CDS, rRNA, tRNA, tmRNA, ncRNA, and repeat_region selected.
media.caption: Keep CDS, rRNA, tRNA, tmRNA, ncRNA, and repeat_region selected.

actions.script: const card = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.card')).find((node) => node.querySelector('summary')?.textContent?.includes('Features')); const summary = card?.querySelector('summary'); const content = card?.querySelector('details > div'); const section = content?.children?.[0]; if (!summary || !section) throw new Error('Feature Types controls not found.'); summary.setAttribute('data-capture', 'feature-types-summary'); section.setAttribute('data-capture', 'feature-types-section'); section.scrollIntoView({ block: 'center' });

manualSteps.title: Enable Multi-Record Canvas
manualSteps.body: Turn on Multi-Record Canvas and use these sizing and row-placement values.
manualSteps.note: The two large chromosomes sit in the top row. The four smaller plasmids share the second row.

operations.title: Multi-Record Canvas controls
operations.body: Turn on Multi-Record Canvas, then set automatic sizing, gaps, and the two record rows.

media.alt: Layout card with Multi-Record Canvas selected, automatic sizing, gap values, and six Record Order rows.
media.caption: Turn on Multi-Record Canvas and set automatic sizing, gaps, and Record Order.

actions.script: () => { const app = window.__GBDRAW_APP__; const actual = (Array.isArray(app?.adv?.multi_record_positions) ? app.adv.multi_record_positions : []).map((entry) => `${entry.selector}@${entry.row}`).join(','); return app?.form?.multi_record_canvas === true && actual === '#1@1,#2@1,#3@2,#4@2,#5@2,#6@2'; }

const label = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('label')).find((node) => node.textContent.includes('Multi-Record Canvas')); if (!label) throw new Error('Multi-Record Canvas toggle not found.'); label.dataset.capture = 'multi-record-canvas-toggle';

manualSteps.title: Add Title
manualSteps.body: Set the plot title and place it below the multi-record canvas.

operations.title: Plot title and bottom position
operations.body: Enter the plot title, then open Plot Title Position and choose Bottom.

media.alt: Compact Title and Legend controls with the Vibrio plot-title field and Plot Title Position menu open with Bottom highlighted.
media.caption: Enter the exact plot title from the table and choose the highlighted Bottom option.

actions.script: () => { const app = window.__GBDRAW_APP__; return app?.form?.plot_title === 'Vibrio nigripulchritudo TUMSAT-TG-2018, complete genome' && app?.adv?.plot_title_position === 'bottom'; }

manualSteps.title: Generate the diagram
manualSteps.body: Click Generate Diagram. The preview should show chromosome 1 and chromosome 2 above plasmids pVNTG1 through pVNTG4, with GC content and GC skew rings inside each record.

media.alt: Generated Vibrio multi-record preview with two chromosomes and four plasmids.
media.caption: The generated preview uses automatic radius scaling for two chromosomes and four plasmids.

manualSteps.title: Inspect a CDS feature
manualSteps.body: Click a CDS feature in the interactive SVG to inspect its label, record ID, location, protein_id, qualifiers, and sequence.

media.alt: Zoomed Vibrio multi-record crop with the clicked CDS on chromosome 1 and its feature popup.
media.caption: The zoomed crop keeps the clicked chromosome CDS and popup metadata readable.

actions.script: document.querySelector('.preview-feature-search')?.style.setProperty('display', 'none', 'important'); const app = window.__GBDRAW_APP__; if (app) { app.resultPanelTab = 'preview'; app.zoom = 1.25; if (app.svgContainer) app.svgContainer.style.transform = 'translate(-80px, -40px) scale(1.25)'; }

() => { const app = window.__GBDRAW_APP__; const feature = app?.extractedFeatures?.find((entry) => entry.svg_id === 'f61c7abf7'); return Boolean(app?.results?.[0]?.content?.includes("data-gbdraw-feature-id=\"f61c7abf7\"") && feature?.gene === 'dnaA' && feature?.record_id === 'NZ_AP024087.1'); }
const app = window.__GBDRAW_APP__; if (app?.clickedFeature) app.clickedFeature.activeTab = 'details'; if (app?.clickedFeaturePos) { app.clickedFeaturePos.x = 620; app.clickedFeaturePos.y = 260; }

troubleshooting.title: Only one record is shown
troubleshooting.body: Check that Multi-Record Canvas is enabled. Without that option, circular mode can render records separately instead of placing them in one canvas.

troubleshooting.title: The plasmids are too small
troubleshooting.body: Raise Min Radius Ratio, or switch Record Size Mode if you need less proportional scaling between chromosomes and plasmids.

troubleshooting.title: The rows differ from the Gallery figure
troubleshooting.body: Check Record Order #1@1, #2@1, #3@2, #4@2, #5@2, and #6@2, plus Column Gap Ratio 0.1 and Row Gap Ratio 0.05.

troubleshooting.title: The generated diagram differs from the Gallery image
troubleshooting.body: Check the GBFF input, Track Preset Tuckin, orchid palette, Separate Strands, Legend Position Left, Plot Title Position Bottom, Record Size Mode Auto, and Min Radius Ratio 0.55.
